name: TeknoParrot Manager - HyperSpin 2 Plugin
author: Jumpstile
description: Optional TeknoParrot setup and import helpers for validating UserProfiles, creating Arcade (TeknoParrot), and importing profile XMLs into HyperHQ.

capabilities.name: teknoparrot-profile-scan
capabilities.description: Validate TeknoParrot UserProfiles XML files and common setup paths

capabilities.name: game-import
capabilities.description: Create Arcade (TeknoParrot) and import UserProfiles XML files as launchable games

capabilities.name: profile-backup
capabilities.description: Create timestamped backups before profile changes

permissions.description: Read TeknoParrot UserProfiles, GameProfiles, Icons, and TeknoParrotUi.exe paths
Write timestamped profile backups when requested
Create the Arcade (TeknoParrot) system, link TeknoParrot, and add profile XML games
Communicate import operations to HyperHQ through Socket.IO

Read-only fetch of the public teknogods/TeknoParrotUI profile-code list, used to resolve dat-based registration matches. Falls back to the local GameProfiles listing if unreachable; never downloads or executes anything.

settings.label: TeknoParrot Folder
settings.description: Folder containing TeknoParrotUi.exe. TeknoParrotUi.exe, UserProfiles, GameProfiles, Icons, and your backup folder are all found automatically from here. Use "Run Setup Wizard" if any of those need to be overridden for a non-standard setup.

settings.label: Games Root Folder
settings.description: Folder containing your extracted TeknoParrot game folders, used for profile registration and GamePath repair. Not a TeknoParrot subfolder -- this is wherever your games actually live.

settings.label: Collection Dat File (optional)
settings.description: Path to an Eggman/RomVault collection .dat or .zip you already have. Used to disambiguate shared-executable games during registration. This plugin does not download this file for you.

settings.label: Control Overrides File (optional)
settings.description: Path to a JSON file for fine-tuning control-binding copying. All fields are optional: "noPropagate" (game codes to leave alone), "forceArchetype" (game code -> the specific already-bound game to copy from), "familyOverride" (game code -> control type, for games detected wrong), "canonicalArchetype" (control type -> the already-bound game whose Input API setting is correct, used to fix any other already-bound game of that type that disagrees).

settings.label: Minimum Bound Buttons To Count As A Reference Game
settings.description: A game needs at least this many buttons already bound before the plugin will treat it as a reference game to copy bindings from for other games of the same control type.

settings.label: Crosshairs Folder (optional)
settings.description: Folder containing PNG crosshair files for lightgun setup. Leave empty to use the 321 crosshairs bundled with this plugin.

settings.label: Download Media
settings.description: Allow HyperHQ to download game logos, artwork, backgrounds, and marquees for imported TeknoParrot games.

settings.label: Auto Sync on Database Connect
settings.description: Automatically sync TeknoParrot profile games when HyperHQ reports the database is ready.

actions.label: Run Setup Wizard
actions.description: Re-launch the TeknoParrot Manager - HyperSpin 2 Plugin setup wizard.

actions.label: Health Check
actions.description: Validate TeknoParrot paths and profile readiness.

actions.label: Scan Profiles
actions.description: Validate configured TeknoParrot UserProfiles XML files.

actions.label: Preview Registration
actions.description: Dry-run TeknoParrot Manager-style profile registration from GameProfiles and extracted game folders.

actions.label: Register Profiles
actions.description: Create missing UserProfiles XMLs from matching GameProfiles without overwriting existing profiles.
actions.confirmationMessage: This will create missing UserProfiles XML files from GameProfiles and your games root folder. Existing profiles are backed up and not overwritten. Continue?

actions.label: Repair Game Paths
actions.description: Repair broken or empty GamePath values when a unique executable match is found.
actions.confirmationMessage: This will update broken or empty GamePath values when a unique safe match is found. Existing profiles are backed up first. Continue?

actions.label: Device Survey
actions.description: Answer a few questions about your controls to get a recommended binding plan. Read-only: changes nothing.

actions.label: Preview: Copy Controls To Other Games
actions.description: Shows what would happen if you copy button bindings from games you've already set up to other games of the same type (driving, lightgun, etc.) -- nothing is changed.

actions.label: Copy Controls To Other Games
actions.description: Copies button bindings from a game you've already bound to every other unbound game of the same type, matched button-by-button. The game you copy from is never changed.
actions.confirmationMessage: This will copy button bindings from games you've already bound to other unbound games of the same type. Existing profiles are backed up first. Continue?

actions.label: Preview Crosshairs
actions.description: Generate an HTML preview grid of all available crosshair PNGs (bundled, or from crosshairsPath if set).

actions.label: Deploy Crosshairs
actions.description: Copy the chosen P1/P2 crosshair PNGs to every registered lightgun game, with optional cursor hiding.
actions.confirmationMessage: This will copy the chosen crosshair images into every registered lightgun game's folder (and PCSX2.ini, for PCSX2 lightgun games). Continue?

actions.label: Hide Cursor For Lightgun Games
actions.description: Sets the cursor-hide field in every registered lightgun profile. Existing profiles are backed up first.
actions.confirmationMessage: This will hide the Windows cursor for every registered lightgun game that supports it. Existing profiles are backed up first. Continue?

actions.label: Preview Import
actions.description: Build a dry-run HyperHQ import payload without changing the database.

actions.label: Sync Games
actions.description: Create Arcade (TeknoParrot), link TeknoParrot, and import configured profile XMLs.
actions.confirmationMessage: This will create or update Arcade (TeknoParrot), link the TeknoParrot launcher, and import configured profile XMLs. Continue?

actions.label: Backup Profiles
actions.description: Create a timestamped backup of UserProfiles XML files.

actions.label: Restore Backup
actions.description: Restore UserProfiles XML files from a selected backup folder.
actions.confirmationMessage: This will restore UserProfiles XML files from the selected backup and create a pre-restore backup first. Continue?

actions.label: Get Status
actions.description: Report TeknoParrot path, profile, and system readiness.

wizards.title: Set up TeknoParrot Manager - HyperSpin 2 Plugin
wizards.description: Point HyperHQ at TeknoParrot, validate profiles, and preview the import before syncing.
wizards.completedTitle: TeknoParrot Manager - HyperSpin 2 Plugin is ready
wizards.completedMessage: Arcade (TeknoParrot) can now be synced from your UserProfiles folder.

steps.title: TeknoParrot Manager - HyperSpin 2 Plugin
steps.description: This optional add-on validates TeknoParrot profiles, creates Arcade (TeknoParrot), and imports existing UserProfiles XML files into HyperHQ.

slides.title: Profile-based imports
slides.description: Configured UserProfiles XML files become launchable HyperHQ games without changing TeknoParrot itself.

slides.title: Arcade system setup
slides.description: HyperHQ can create the canonical Arcade (TeknoParrot) system and TeknoParrot launcher mapping.

slides.title: Backups before restore
slides.description: Profile backup and restore tools keep the TeknoParrot configuration recoverable.

steps.title: TeknoParrot Paths
steps.description: Point at your TeknoParrot folder. TeknoParrotUi.exe, UserProfiles, GameProfiles, and Icons are all found automatically from there -- you only need to fill in the fields below it if your setup is non-standard.

form.label: TeknoParrot Folder
form.helpText: The folder containing TeknoParrotUi.exe. Everything else on this page is found automatically from here unless you override it below.

form.label: Games Root Folder
form.helpText: Where your extracted games live (not a TeknoParrot subfolder). Optional -- used to register missing UserProfiles and repair broken GamePath values.

form.label: Backup Folder
form.helpText: Where this plugin saves a timestamped copy of your profiles before any change. Defaults to a Backups\HyperHQ folder under TeknoParrot Folder.

form.label: Collection Dat File (advanced)
form.helpText: Optional. Point at a collection .dat or .zip you already have to help registration resolve shared-executable games. Not downloaded by this plugin.

form.label: TeknoParrotUi.exe (advanced override)
form.helpText: Only needed if TeknoParrotUi.exe isn't directly inside TeknoParrot Folder.

form.label: UserProfiles Folder (advanced override)
form.helpText: Only needed if UserProfiles isn't directly inside TeknoParrot Folder.

form.label: GameProfiles Folder (advanced override)
form.helpText: Only needed if GameProfiles isn't directly inside TeknoParrot Folder.

form.label: Icons Folder (advanced override)
form.helpText: Only needed if Icons isn't directly inside TeknoParrot Folder.

steps.title: Choose import options
steps.description: Pick how HyperHQ should handle media and automatic sync for TeknoParrot profile imports.

form.label: Download media
form.description: Allow HyperHQ to download game logos, artwork, backgrounds, and marquees for imported TeknoParrot games.

form.label: Sync when database connects
form.description: Automatically sync TeknoParrot profile games when HyperHQ reports the database is ready.

steps.title: Register missing profiles
steps.description: When a games root folder is configured, HyperHQ can create missing UserProfiles from GameProfiles using the same no-overwrite registration idea as TeknoParrot Manager.

steps.title: Scan Profiles
steps.description: Check profile XML files for missing paths, duplicate names, and parse problems.

steps.title: Preview Import
steps.description: Preview the system, emulator, and games HyperHQ will receive.
steps.errorText: Import preview could not be generated.

steps.title: Sync Games
steps.description: Create Arcade (TeknoParrot), link TeknoParrot, and import the profile XML games.
steps.errorText: TeknoParrot games could not be synced.

steps.title: Setup complete
steps.description: TeknoParrot Manager - HyperSpin 2 Plugin setup is complete. HyperHQ will use these settings for profile validation, imports, backups, and launching.

slides.title: Ready to play
slides.description: Your setup state has been saved so this wizard will not open again automatically.
